entities.name: EARTH OBSERVATION DATA
entities.description: Data flows from satellite observations used for agriculture monitoring

entities.name: CLOUD COMPUTING INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Computing resources used to scale the monitoring system for national use

entities.name: OPERATIONAL AGRICULTURE MONITORING
entities.description: The process of monitoring crops at a national scale in near real-time at parcel resolution

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A Copernicus satellite mission providing high-resolution imagery and a 5-day revisit cycle

entities.name: SEN2-AGRI
entities.description: An automated open-source system that processes satellite time series to derive agriculture monitoring products

entities.name: CLOUD-FREE COMPOSITES
entities.description: One of the four products generated by the Sen2-Agri system

entities.name: DYNAMIC CROPLAND MASKS
entities.description: One of the four products generated by the Sen2-Agri system used to identify cropland

entities.name: CROP TYPE MAPS
entities.description: One of the four products generated by the Sen2-Agri system to identify specific crop types

entities.name: VEGETATION STATUS INDICATORS
entities.description: One of the four products generated by the Sen2-Agri system to monitor crop health

entities.name: LANDSAT 8
entities.description: A satellite providing time series data processed by the Sen2-Agri system

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING ALGORITHMS
entities.description: Algorithms used by the Sen2-Agri system to derive monitoring products

entities.name: IN SITU DATA
entities.description: Ground-truth data collected for calibration and validation of the system products

entities.name: UKRAINE
entities.description: One of the countries where the Sen2-Agri system was demonstrated at national scale

entities.description: One of the countries where the Sen2-Agri system was demonstrated at national scale

entities.description: An initiative requesting national monitoring capacity to support market transparency

entities.description: An initiative requesting national monitoring capacity to support market transparency
